mapper.select: /* 나의 상호평가 결과 ForumMutDAO.selectMutResult */ SELECT COUNT(*) AS mutCnt , NVL(ROUND(AVG(SCR)), 0) AS mutAvg FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_MTL_EVL WHERE STD_ID = ( SELECT STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID= #{crsCreCd} AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' ) AND DSCS_ID = #{forumCd}
/* 상호평가 조회 ForumMutDAO.selectMut */ SELECT SCR , OPNN , DSCS_ID , STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_MTL_EVL WHERE MTL_EVL_ID = #{mutSn}

/* 상호평가 목록 조회 ForumMutDAO.selectForumMutResultList */ SELECT A.STD_ID , A.DSCS_ID , A.MTL_EVL_ID , A.SCR , A.OPNN , A.RGTR_ID , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE ORG_ID = B.ORG_ID AND USER_ID = A.RGTR_ID) AS RGTRNM , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM , (SELECT PHT_FILE FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = A.RGTR_ID) AS PHT_FILE_BYTE FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_MTL_EVL A JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT B ON A.STD_ID = B.STD_ID AND B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND B.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND B.AUDITYN = 'N' AND B.ORG_ID = #{orgId} WHERE A.DSCS_ID = #{forumCd} AND A.STD_ID = #{stdNo} ORDER BY A.FRST_INQ_DTTM DESC
